emails.subject: Chisholm LOI
emails.body: Chisholm LOI Lorie Please see the attached version of the LOI. I have added a paragraph paragraph 6 as a non-solicitation provision. Be aware that these usually are negotiated to be mutual and, in that event, I will be required to obtain approval of a mutual provision at three different levels, including Corp. This is current policy within the company to ensure we do not bind other divisions or groups to a non-solicit that we cannot comply with. Let me know your thoughts. Mark

emails.subject: Chisholm LOI
emails.body: Chisholm LOI Lorie Sorry for the misunderstanding. Please see the attached. I believe this is a bit more on point. Mark

emails.subject: RE: Chisholm LOI
emails.body: RE: Chisholm LOI This document will be fine. Can you have two copies prepared with initials and such? Thanks again. lorie
